zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Scrope於大約1388年出生在英國越可爾馬斯哈姆時，他的父親Sir Stephen Scrope38歲，母親Margery Welles39歲。他於1422年8月24日與Elizabeth Chaworth在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1455年11月15日在英國越可爾約克享年68歲，埋葬在英國越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Scrope于大约1388年出生在英国越可爾馬斯哈姆时，他的父亲Sir Stephen Scrope38岁，母亲Margery Welles39岁。他于1422年8月24日与Elizabeth Chaworth在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1455年11月15日在英国越可爾約克享年68岁，埋葬在英国越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Scrope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: of uncertain origin. Tengvik suggests derivation from the Old Scandinavian personal name Skrópi (of doubtful etymology, but compare Old Scandinavian skrópa-maðr ‘hypocrite’, containing the genitive plural form of skrópar ‘sham, hypocrisy’). It is possible, but not certain, that this personal name forms the first element of the Notts place-name Scrooby. Otherwise there is no evidence for its currency in England or, more relevantly, in Normandy. Richards Castle (in Herefs and Shrops) was apparently named after Richard Scrope, who held estates in Herefs and Worcs in 1066 and was a Norman favourite of Edward the Confessor. The Scrope family, whose name is traditionally pronounced /skru:p/, was politically important in medieval England, and acquired estates in Lincs (Barton on Humber), NR Yorks (Castle Bolton), and in ER Yorks (Flotmanby). Richard (le) Scrope of Bolton, in Wensleydale, was Lord Chancellor in the reign of Richard II. The use of le and de in the surname, suggesting either a nickname or a locative name, must be treated with caution because these were often added gratuitously to Anglo-Norman surnames as a sign of high social status.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Scrope was born about 1388, in Masham, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Stephen Scrope, was 38 and his mother, Margery Welles, was 39. He married Elizabeth Chaworth on 24 August 1422, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 15 November 1455, in York, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Scrope est né environ 1388, à Masham, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Stephen Scrope, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margery Welles, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Chaworth le 24 août 1422, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 15 novembre 1455, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Scrope um 1388 in Masham, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Stephen Scrope 38 und seine Mutter Margery Welles 39. Er hat am 24. August 1422 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Chaworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 15. November 1455 im Alter von 68 Jahren in York, Yorkshire, England und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Scrope è nato il circa 1388 nel Masham, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Stephen Scrope, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Margery Welles, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Chaworth il 24 agosto 1422, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 15 novembre 1455, nel York, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Scropeが約1388年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマシャムで生まれた時，父Sir Stephen Scropeは38歳，母Margery Wellesは39歳であった。1422年8月24日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでElizabeth Chaworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1455年11月15日にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで68歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Scrope(이)가 대략 1388년 영국 요르크실르 마샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Stephen Scrope(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Welles(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1422년 8월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Elizabeth Chaworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1455년 11월 15일 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Scrope nasceu aproximadamente 1388, em Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Stephen Scrope, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margery Welles, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Chaworth em 24 de agosto de 1422, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de novembro de 1455, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Scrope родился около 1388 г. в местности машам, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Stephen Scrope было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Welles, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Chaworth 24 августа 1422 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 15 ноября 1455 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Scrope nació aproximadamente 1388, en Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Stephen Scrope, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margery Welles, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Chaworth el 24 de agosto de 1422, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 15 de noviembre de 1455, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
